feedback.text: It's the same monopolization that Apple attempted some time ago, dangerous, greedy, corporation-style blocking of installing things you want, letting you install ONLY things THEY want and things they ALLOW, this is significant violation of digital freedom and can restrict usage of many things that google monopoly just simply wants to get rid of because it doesn't like it or it if its a rival app/package to whatever they provide, again disastrously wrong and greedy.
